data.name: WorkspaceServiceBufferPositionOutOfOrder
data.value: Start position ({0}, {1}) must come before or be equal to the end position ({2}, {3})

data.name: WorkspaceServicePositionLineOutOfRange
data.value: Position is outside of file line range

data.name: WorkspaceServicePositionColumnOutOfRange
data.value: Position is outside of column range for line {0}

data.name: ErrorEmptyStringReplacement
data.value: Replacement of an empty string by an empty string.

data.name: StarExpansionLabel
data.value: Expand {0}

data.name: StarExpansionDescription
data.value: Replace {0} with {1} columns: {2}

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringInvalidAuthType
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for AuthenticationType. Valid values are 'Integrated' and 'SqlLogin'.

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringInvalidColumnEncryptionSetting
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for Column Encryption Setting. Valid values are 'Enabled' and 'Disabled'.

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringInvalidSecureEnclaves
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for Secure enclaves. Valid values are 'Enabled' and 'Disabled'.

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringInvalidEncryptOption
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for Encrypt. Valid values are 'Optional', 'Mandatory', 'Strict', 'True', 'False', 'Yes' and 'No'.

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringInvalidEnclaveAttestationProtocol
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for Attestation protocol. Valid values are 'AAS', 'HGS' and 'None'.

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringMissingAttestationProtocolWithSecureEnclaves
data.value: Attestation protocol cannot be empty with Secure enclaves enabled.

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringMissingAttestationUrlWithAttestationProtocol
data.value: Attestation URL cannot be empty with the selected value of Attestation protocol.

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringInvalidAlwaysEncryptedOptionCombination
data.value: The Attestation protocol and Attestation URL requires Always Encrypted with Secure enclaves to be set to Enabled.

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringInvalidAttestationProtocolNoneWithUrl
data.value: The Attestation URL must not be specified with Attestation protocol 'None'. Either set appropriate Attestation protocol or remove Attestation URL from connection properties.

data.name: ConnectionServiceConnStringInvalidIntent
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for ApplicationIntent. Valid values are 'ReadWrite' and 'ReadOnly'.

data.name: PeekDefinitionAzureError
data.value: This feature is currently not supported on Azure SQL DB and Data Warehouse: {0}

data.name: PeekDefinitionError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred during Peek Definition execution: {0}

data.name: PeekDefinitionNoResultsError
data.value: No results were found.

data.name: PeekDefinitionDatabaseError
data.value: No database object was retrieved.

data.name: PeekDefinitionTypeNotSupportedError
data.value: This object type is currently not supported by this feature.

data.name: PeekDefinitionNotConnectedError
data.value: Please connect to a server.

data.name: PeekDefinitionTimedoutError
data.value: Operation timed out.

data.name: RenameNotSupportedLiveServer
data.value: Rename is only supported in SQL project files. To rename objects on a connected server, use sp_rename.

data.name: RenameNotSupported
data.value: Renaming an object of this type is not supported.

data.name: ParameterizationDetails
data.value: {0} will be converted to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object with the following properties: SqlDbType = {1}, Size = {2}, Precision = {3}, Scale = {4}, SqlValue = {5}
data.comment: . Parameters: 0 - variableName (string), 1 - sqlDbType (string), 2 - size (int), 3 - precision (int), 4 - scale (int), 5 - sqlValue (string)

data.name: ErrorMessageHeader
data.value: Line {0}

data.name: ErrorMessage
data.value: Unable to convert {0} to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object. The specified literal cannot be converted to {1}(Microsoft.Data.SqlDbType). Literal value: {2}

data.name: DateTimeErrorMessage
data.value: Unable to convert {0} to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object. The specified literal cannot be converted to {1}(Microsoft.Data.SqlDbType), as it used an unsupported date/time format. Use one of the supported date/time formats. Literal value: {2}

data.name: BinaryLiteralPrefixMissingError
data.value: Unable to convert {0} to a Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlParameter object. The specified literal cannot be converted to {1}(Microsoft.Data.SqlDbType), as prefix 0x is expected for a binary literals. Literal value: {2}

data.name: ParsingErrorHeader
data.value: Line {0}, column {1}

data.name: ScriptTooLarge
data.value: The current script is too large for Parameterization for Always Encrypted, please disable Parameterization for Always Encrypted in Query Options (Query > Query Options > Execution > Advanced). Maximum allowable length: {0} characters, Current script length: {1} characters
